name: Sour Cream Rhubarb Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Arrange rhubarb in the unbaked pie shell. Mix sugar and flour; blend in sour cream and pour over mixture evenly. Blend topping ingredients until crumbly. Sprinkle crumbs over rhubarb. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes, then reduce temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 30 minutes until fruit is tender, filling set, and crumb topping golden. Fat grams per serving: Approximately; Cook Time: About 45 minutes.
